heading: From onboarding to first post in under 10 minutes.

steps.title: Tell us your niche and city
steps.description: Set up your profile in under 5 minutes: business type, city, and target audience. No long forms, no technical setup.

steps.title: We map your local competitors
steps.description: Our AI automatically identifies your top 3 local competitors and analyzes what they post — frequency, topics, and engagement.

steps.title: We find the gap
steps.description: Based on competitive analysis, we detect topics no competitor covers. That's your space to dominate the local conversation.

steps.title: Posts ready, you approve
steps.description: Postable generates posts based on identified gaps. You review, adjust if needed, and approve. Publishing is automatically scheduled.
